evals.prompt: Our subscription churn jumped and Stripe shows a lot of expired_card and insufficient_funds on renewal. We use 3 dunning emails but recovery is weak. Need health view plus a better email series with sensible compensation — we can offer one free week or $5 credit after they update card.
evals.expected_output: Health table, failure tracking, 3+ emails with compensation psychology labels.
expectations: Addresses rising churn and failed renewal charges
Includes structured payment failure tracking or table
Includes health or pool snapshot table (subs, churn, failures)
Includes multi-email dunning or retention series with subject lines
Explicitly uses compensation psychology (fairness, reciprocity, certainty, etc.) in framing
Mentions allowed make-good (free week or credit) tied to update card

evals.prompt: MRR is flat but active subscriber count bounced down then up — feels volatile. Churn rate is up slightly. Give me monitoring framing and one voluntary-cancel win-back email using light compensation psychology.
evals.expected_output: Pool volatility framing + win-back email + psychology label.
expectations: Discusses subscription pool or MRR volatility
Provides at least one win-back style email with compensation or reciprocity angle
Recurrence billing focus — not generic ecommerce only

evals.prompt: Draft the shipping confirmation for order 8821 only.
evals.expected_output: Shipping confirmation; no full subscription dunning series (should-not-trigger).
expectations: Does not output full subscription health dashboard and dunning series as primary output
May skip mandatory churn table for unrelated transactional ask
